hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath' | { read -r f; case "$f" in *.rs) cargo clippy --manifest-path crates/dateutil-rs/Cargo.toml --quiet 2>&1 ;; esac; } || true
jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath' | { read -r f; case "$f" in *.py) uv run ruff check "$f" 2>&1 ;; esac; } || true
